creator: sheldonh@iafrica.com
text:
Hi Simon,

Do you have any feedback on using FreeBSD with your Cyrix 6x86 P166+ MMX
any time after 2.2.8-RELEASE or 3.0-RELEASE?

If you don't remember the details of your problem report, you can view
it at http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=5130 . I must admit it
looks like finger-trouble to me, but I thought I'd better check all the
same.

Ciao,
Sheldon.
